## [0.1.1] - 2026-04-20

### Bug Fixes

- Emit 0x2 (proper pair) and 0x10 (self reverse) flags ([#4](https://github.com/fg-labs/bwa-mem3-rs/pull/4))

### Documentation

- Add per-crate READMEs so crates.io renders a landing page ([#2](https://github.com/fg-labs/bwa-mem3-rs/pull/2))

### Features

- Refresh bwa-mem3 to e80765b + adopt upstream helpers ([#6](https://github.com/fg-labs/bwa-mem3-rs/pull/6))

### Refactor

- Cache ref_string on the index handle, borrow per-batch ([#5](https://github.com/fg-labs/bwa-mem3-rs/pull/5))
